test_scenarios.patient_input: I'm having severe chest pain that started 30 minutes ago. It feels like pressure and it's radiating to my left arm. I'm also sweating and feeling nauseous.
I can't breathe properly. I'm having severe difficulty breathing and my lips are turning blue. This started suddenly about 10 minutes ago.
My father suddenly can't move his right arm and his face is drooping on one side. He's also having trouble speaking clearly. This just happened 5 minutes ago.
I have a high fever of 103°F that's been going on for 2 days. I also have severe body aches, chills, and a bad headache. I can't keep any food down.
I fell and twisted my ankle badly 3 hours ago. It's extremely swollen, I can't put any weight on it, and the pain is getting worse. It's also turning purple.
I have severe abdominal pain in my lower right side that started this morning. It's getting progressively worse and I've vomited twice. I also have a low fever.
I've had a persistent cough for about a week now. It's producing yellow-green mucus and I have a mild fever around 100°F. I'm also feeling very tired.
I have a painful rash on my torso that appeared 2 days ago. It's red with small blisters and it burns. The rash is only on one side of my body.
I've been having frequent urination with a burning sensation for the past 2 days. I also have lower back pain and my urine looks cloudy.
I have a mild cold with a runny nose and slight cough that started yesterday. No fever, just feeling a bit under the weather.
I have a small cut on my finger from cooking 2 days ago. It's been healing but I want to make sure it doesn't get infected. No redness or swelling.
I've been having occasional mild headaches in the afternoon for the past week. They go away with rest. No other symptoms.
I don't feel well but I'm not sure what's wrong. Just general malaise.
I have multiple issues: back pain for months, occasional dizziness, trouble sleeping, and I've been stressed at work.
